problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
hypothesis: The key to What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified is Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction — specifically Monoclonal antibody blocking — which would help 17,000,000 people affected.
